sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 넷플릭스가 워너브라더스 디스커버리(WBD)의 스트리밍 및 스튜디오 사업부를 인수하는 합병 계약을 체결했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 넷플릭스는 워너브라더스 디스커버리의 스트리밍 및 스튜디오 사업부를 인수하기 위한 합병 계약을 체결했습니다.
양사 이사회는 이번 합병 계약을 만장일치로 승인했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 워너브라더스 디스커버리는 글로벌 리니어 네트워크 사업 등을 분리하고, 스트리밍 및 스튜디오 사업부(Retained Business)를 넷플릭스의 자회사로 편입하는 구조조정을 진행합니다.

watchItems.text: 이번 합병을 통해 넷플릭스가 확보하게 될 스트리밍 및 스튜디오 사업부의 구체적인 자산 범위와 향후 통합 시너지 효과를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: lowing provisions: ☒ Written communications pursuant to Rule 425 under the Securities Act (17 CFR 230.425) ☐ Soliciting material pursuant to Rule 14a-12 under the Exchange Act (17 CFR 240.14a-12) ☐ Pre-commencement communications pursuant to Rule 14d-2(b) under the Exchange Act (17 CFR 240.14d-2(b)) ☐ Pre-commencement communications pursuant to Rule 13e-4(c) under the Exchange Act (17 CFR 240.13e-4(c)) Securities registered pursuant to Section 12(b) of the Act: Title of each class Trading symbol(s) Name of each exchange on which registered Common stock, par value $0.001 per share NFLX NASDAQ Global Select Market Indicate by check mark whether the registrant is an emerging growth company as defined in Rule 405 of the Securities Act of 1933 (§230.405 of this chapter) or Rule 12b-2 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (§240.12b-2 of this chapter). Emerging growth company ☐ If an emerging  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.001 = 0.001달러.

growth company, indicate by check mark if the registrant has elected not to use the extended transition period for complying with any new or revised financial accounting standards provided pursuant to Section 13(a) of the Exchange Act. ☐ Item 1.01 Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement. Agreement and Plan of Merger On December 4, 2025, Netflix, Inc., a Delaware corporation (“Netflix”), Nightingale Sub, Inc., a Delaware corporation and wholly owned subsidiary of Netflix (“Merger Sub”), Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc., a Delaware corporation (“WBD”), and New Topco 25, Inc., a newly formed Delaware corporation and wholly owned subsidiary of WBD (“Newco”), entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger (the “Merger Agreement”), pursuant to which, subject to the terms of the Merger Agreement, among other things, (i) a newly formed Delaware corporation and wholly owned subsidiary of Newco will

merge with and into WBD (the “Holdco Merger”) in accordance with Section 251(g) of the General Corporation Law of the State of Delaware, with WBD surviving as a wholly owned subsidiary of Newco and with the stockholders of WBD immediately prior to the effective time of the Holdco Merger becoming the stockholders of Newco at and immediately following the effective time of the Holdco Merger, and (ii) following an internal reorganization and the separation and distribution of WBD’s Global Linear Networks business and certain other assets as further described below, as a result of which WBD will hold the Streaming & Studios businesses of WBD (the “Retained Business”), Merger Sub will merge with and into WBD, with WBD surviving as a wholly owned subsidiary of Netflix (the “Merger”). The Boards of Directors of Netflix and WBD have unanimously approved the Merger Agreement, including the Merger
